ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_observations" (
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where the observation was made */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the observation */,
  "temp_c" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "dew_point_temp_c" REAL /* Dew point temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "rel_hum" REAL /* Relative humidity as a percentage */,
  "wind_speed_km_h" REAL /* Wind speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "visibility_km" REAL /* Visibility in kilometers */,
  "press_kpa" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in kilopascals */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather condition (e.g., Snow, Rain, Sunny) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Data format (CSV, JSON, XML) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Data quality and reliability */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction (e.g., N, S, E, W) */,
  "precipitation_type" TEXT /* Type of precipitation (e.g., rain, snow) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_observations_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_observations_weather_condition FOREIGN KEY ("weather_condition") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("condition_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station in meters */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the station manager */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Maintenance schedule for the station */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the condition (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the icon for the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where the forecast was made */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the forecast */,
  "temp_c" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "dew_point_temp_c" REAL /* Dew point temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "rel_hum" REAL /* Relative humidity as a percentage */,
  "wind_speed_km_h" REAL /* Wind speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "visibility_km" REAL /* Visibility in kilometers */,
  "press_kpa" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in kilopascals */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather condition (e.g., Snow, Rain, Sunny) */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecasting model used */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the forecast (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES forecast_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_weather_condition FOREIGN KEY ("weather_condition") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("condition_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "accuracy_metrics" TEXT /* Accuracy metrics of the model */,
  "last_trained_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was last trained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, researcher, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view forecast, view observation) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where the alert was issued */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the alert */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather condition that triggered the alert */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "affected_area" TEXT /* Area affected by the alert */,
  "action_required" TEXT /* Action required (e.g., evacuate, take shelter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message sent to the user */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., alert, update) */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Read status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., satellite, weather radar) */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the data */,
  "data" TEXT /* Actual data (e.g., image, radar reading) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of external data (e.g., image, radar) */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("condition_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "satellite_data" (
  "satellite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each satellite data point */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the satellite data */,
  "image_data" TEXT /* Actual image data */,
  "satellite_name" TEXT /* Name of the satellite */,
  "orbit_position" TEXT /* Orbit position of the satellite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("satellite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_satellite_data_date_time FOREIGN KEY ("date_time") REFERENCES weather_observations ("date_time")
)

CREATE TABLE "radar_data" (
  "radar_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each radar data point */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the radar data */,
  "radar_reading" TEXT /* Actual radar reading */,
  "radar_name" TEXT /* Name of the radar */,
  "radar_location" TEXT /* Location of the radar */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("radar_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_radar_data_date_time FOREIGN KEY ("date_time") REFERENCES weather_observations ("date_time")
)
